_ImportMode_help: Optional. 'manualimport' (default since fix24) dispatches via /api/v3/command name=ManualImport -- atomic, fires SignalR events, polls command status, races CDH to delete the queue entry on success. 'scan' uses the legacy DownloadedEpisodesScan command + timed cleanup; keep as a fallback if manualimport ever misbehaves on your setup.
